channel.title: Projects on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: html5seo
item.description: An HTML5 template containing metadata described by: Twitter card, Facebook’s Open Graph Protocol, Google’s JSON+LD, and HTML5.

item.title: hopfield_tests
item.description: These Python scripts can be used to test the recall effectiveness of Hopfield Networks. A sample dataset composed of the Walsh vectors, an orthogonal system is included by default.

item.title: git-quick-stats
item.description: A personal fork of ▁▅▆▃▅ Git quick statistics is a simple and efficient way to access various statistics in git repository.

item.title: emails
item.description: A machine learning project for classifying emails into spam and ham. Uses C for preprocessing emails, Python for parsing and extracting low-level features of emails, and a few lines of Matlab for running several classic classifiers.

item.title: cv-composer
item.description: Command-line based computer vision algorithms showcase. Uses the OpenCV C++ library.

item.title: cuda-fft
item.description: Yet another FFT implementation in CUDA. Includes benchmarks using simple data for comparing different implementations.

item.title: CORE
item.description: Implementation of SPJ’s Tutorial Core compilers in modern Haskell (unfinished)

item.title: coolnoise
item.description: Parser and generator for programs written in the Classroom Object-Oriented Language. Eases testing of lexer and parser.

item.title: cheatsheets
item.description: Toolkit for converting notes into compact PDFs suitable for quick reference sheets, cheatsheets, cribsheets, etc. Notes can be written in markdown, are rendered to PDF by Pandoc.

item.title: Configuration files
item.description: My portable, personal, developer-centric setup for common Linux and MacOS tools.

item.title: hugo-hugo-coder
item.description: A minimalist blog theme for hugo with roguh’s edits

item.title: ansible-fwknop
item.description: Ansible role that secures ports on your server from unauthorized access using fwknop, an improved port knocking utility.
roguh i3empty title: i3empty date: 2019-09-11T20:22:19Z summary: Quickly switch to a new numbered workspace. Utility for the i3 window manager. github.com/roguh/roguh
roguh lithe title: lithe date: 2019-09-11T20:22:32Z summary: A lightweight Hugo theme. github.com/roguh/roguh

roguh nodejs-api-starter title: nodejs-api-starter date: 2019-09-11T20:24:21Z summary: Boilerplate and tooling for authoring data API backends with Node.js and GraphQL. A personal fork. github.com/roguh/roguh https://reactstarter.com/nodejs
roguh ocaml-lox title: ocaml-lox date: 2019-09-11T20:24:46Z summary: Lox interpreter written in OCaml. github.com/roguh/roguh https://craftinginterpreters.com
roguh ocaml-parsing title: ocaml-parsing date: 2018-09-17T21:47:28Z summary: Boilerplate code for writing parsers in OCaml using Menhir + sedlex github.com/roguh/roguh
roguh pandoc-resume title: pandoc-resume date: 2019-02-19T14:12:36Z summary: Write a résumé in markdown and convert to PDF, DOCX, and HTML. github.com/roguh/roguh

roguh passwordstore-noise-generator title: passwordstore-noise-generator date: 2019-09-11T20:25:23Z summary: Patches up a possible side-channel in zx2c4’s pass password manager. github.com/roguh/roguh
roguh PhotoFest title: PhotoFest date: 2019-09-11T20:25:50Z summary: PhotoFest is a secure self-hosted flat-file photo collection webapp written in Rust (unfinished) github.com/roguh/roguh

roguh polybar-themer title: polybar-themer date: 2019-09-11T20:27:30Z summary: A theme generator for polybar, a popular status bar for Linux. Uses math and advanced YAML parsing to generate colorful, sensible color schemes. github.com/roguh/roguh https://polybar.github.io/

roguh pympw title: pympw date: 2019-09-11T20:30:24Z summary: A Python implementation of the Master Password algorithm v3 with a nice Linux CLI github.com/roguh/roguh http://www.masterpasswordapp.com/masterpassword-algorithm.pdf
